name: M4A1消音版 | 氮化处理
descriptionEn: With a smaller magazine than its unmuffled counterpart, the silenced M4A1 provides quieter shots with less recoil and better accuracy. It has individual parts spray-painted black and tangerine orange. Rona is as good as she thinks she is... she's just not old enough to realize she shouldn't point it out to everyone - Felix Riley, Commanding Officer
descriptionZh: 消音版 M4A1 相对于它那没有消音器的同行来说弹匣更小，枪声也较为“沉默”，还拥有更小的后坐力和更高的精准度。 这把武器的部分零件用黑色和蜜桔色进行了喷漆。 罗纳与她对自己的评价一样出色……她只是太年轻，而没有意识到并不该向所有人透露出这点 - 指挥官费利克斯.莱利
